fato_historico: 1789: Storming of the Bastille in Paris. This event escalates the widespread discontent into the French Revolution. Bastille Day is still celebrated annually in France.
energia_do_dia: Just as historic walls once crumbled to pave the way for a brighter future, you may feel an urge to break free from self-imposed limitations today. It is a good time to transform your deep-seated emotions into powerful personal liberation. Consider how your intensity acts as a catalyst for growth, bringing a four-leaf clover of luck into your path.
frase_do_dia: Your inner light has the power to reshape your entire world with grace.
significado_numero: Represents change, movement, and the flow of newfound creative energy.
conselho: Trust your intuition and release what no longer serves your highest good.
